rows.label: qev085106_MSG0001
rows.name: It's not those two—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0002
rows.name:
You're right— They're different
from those two from the Growth—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0003
rows.name: I'm sorry for startling you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0003_2
rows.name: I am Elma. And you are?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0005
rows.name:
Elma-san, the ones the
Growth were searching for—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0006
rows.name: It seems so.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0007
rows.name:
Could it be that you are
being chased by the Growth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0008
rows.name: If so, we might be able to help. We are—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0009
rows.name:
We came from a planet called Earth.
We are hostile towards the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0010
rows.name: Really?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0011
rows.name: You mustn't believe them, Rock![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0012
rows.name:
But Celica— these people somehow
feel different from those guys.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0013
rows.name:
Even so, I don't want to
be deceived anymore![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0014
rows.name: There are motion signatures further in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0015
rows.name:
It might be the Qlurian
woman and the Gaur.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0016
rows.name: Captain, it's the search targets![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0017
rows.name: Why are Earthlings with them?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0018
rows.name:
We'll withdraw for now. Call
the main force for backup![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0019
rows.name: They are running away mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0020
rows.name:
Let's pursue them. It will be troublesome
if they call for reinforcements.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085106_MSG0021
rows.name: Right![ST:wait ]
